meaning: 索尔福德[英国英格兰西北部港市]
examples: Eleven institutions and companies from across Europe are contributing to FascinatE, including the BBC, Technicolor and Salford University.
Salford Quays already has more than 150 media-related businesses.
Stand-offs with police continued around Salford shopping precinct.
Pictures of suspected rioters are being displayed on advertising vans being driven around Manchester and Salford.
